repair_suggestion: Optional dependency 'mineru' is not installed. Install the parser-mineru extra or use backend=builtin.

known_limitations: MinerU 3.3 strengthening adds dependency-gated CLI integration and Markdown/JSON output normalization.
Default install does not bundle MinerU or local model files.
Table, figure, and formula metadata are normalized when MinerU emits them, but quality depends on the local MinerU runtime.
backend.fallback_behavior: If parser-mineru or local MinerU model/runtime is missing, the report marks the backend unavailable/failed and preserves builtin fallback guidance.
